song.title: And Can It Be
song.author: Lindell Cooley
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Am/C D G C D G D A D And can be that I should gain,|an interest in my Savior's blood? .D G/D G/B D C G D G Died He for me, who caused His pain?|For me, who Him to death pursued? .G G/D C A D Amazing love, how can it be . G C D G That thou my Lord should die for me?
[V2] 'Tis mystery all! Th'Immortal dies! who can explore His strange design? In vain the firstborn seraph tries to sound the depths of love divine! 'Tis mercy all! let earth adore, let angel minds inquire no more.
[V3] He left His father's throne above, So free, so infinite His grace; emptied Himself of all but love, And bled for Adam's helpless race: 'Tis mercy all, immense and free; For, O my God, it found out me.
[V4] .G Am/C D G C D G D A D Long my imprisoned spi__rit lay,|Fast bound in sin and nature's night, .D G/D G/B D C G D G Thine eye diffused a quickening ray,|I woke, the dungeon flamed with light; .G G/D C A D My chains fell off, my heart was free, . G C D G I rose, went forth and followed thee.
[V5] .G Am/C D G C D G D A D No condemnation now I dread,|Jesus, and all in Him, is mine; .D G/D G/B D C G D G Alive in Him, my living Head|and clothed with righteousness divine, .G G/D C A D Bold I approach the eternal throne, . G C D G And claim the crown through Christ, my own.
